cohorts.label: Idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis lung tissue
cohorts.notes: Direct lung case-control microarray cohort with explicit counts, though the control source is not healthy donor lung.

cohorts.label: Normal-control lung tissue from patients with primary spontaneous pneumothorax
cohorts.notes: The comparator arm comes from pneumothorax tissue rather than healthy donor lung.

open_questions: Cross-check the generated registry record against the benchmark-pack note: GEO overall design reports 5 IPF lung tissues and 3 normal-control lung tissues from patients with primary spontaneous pneumothorax.
